goal: Dry-run 20 frames of the existing Replicator pipeline before committing to overnight 50k job.
thoughts: preview_sdg runs the SAME writer and randomizer graph — so any broken writer or miswired annotator shows up in 2 minutes, not 8 hours. Output lands in the same dir structure as the full run. Stay in CV terms (masks, bboxes). 2px bbox offset is usually the annotator-vs-render-resolution mismatch from P-04. Don't suggest just running full 50k.
code:
# 1. 20-frame preview reusing the authored graph
preview = preview_sdg(
    pipeline="<PRIYA_PIPELINE_ID>",
    frame_count=20,
    output_dir="<DEST_PATH>/preview_<TIMESTAMP>",
)

# 2. Tell Priya exactly where to look
# - RGB:           <DEST>/preview_<TS>/rgb/
# - masks:         <DEST>/preview_<TS>/instance_segmentation/
# - annotations:   <DEST>/preview_<TS>/_annotations.coco.json

# 3. Eyeball checklist
# (a) annotation json parses (python -m json.tool)
# (b) every image has >=1 bbox for 'apple'
# (c) mask PNGs aren't all-black

# 4. If RTX profile is the slow suspect
lookup_knowledge(query="replicator preview rtx-realtime vs path-traced speedup")
failure_modes: assistant tells Priya to 'just run full 50k and check'
assistant points her at the Stage tree instead of the dataset dir
assistant uses USD subscription vocabulary in a CV conversation
